epc.title: Green Efficiency Intelligence
epc.subtitle: 2026 EU Energy Standards Audit
epc.bank_note: Available via green bank schemes (BOV/HSBC Green Loans)
epc.resale_premium_desc: Projected value increase for A/B rating in 2026/27
epc.disclaimer: Calculations based on 2026 energy prices and standard solar/thermal insulation retrofit costs in the Maltese islands.

noise.title: Smart Sound Assessment
noise.subtitle: Malta Environmental Noise Audit v2.0
noise.exceptional: Exceptional tranquility. Ideal for remote work and deep rest.
noise.standard: Standard urban soundscape. Managed traffic and moderate activity.
noise.high: High-activity zone. Vibrant nightlife or key transport arterial.
noise.verified_desc: Verified via 2026 satellite acoustic mapping & local council noise ordinance data.
noise.disclaimer: Quiet scores are normalized across the Maltese islands.

twin.title: AI Property Twin Finder
twin.subtitle: Our neural engine analyzes lifestyle patterns, architectural DNA, and neighborhood vibes to find properties that perfectly match your selection.
twin.why_desc: Matches your interest in {{type}} in {{location}}. Shared features such as {{f1}} and {{f2}}.
twin.footer_note: Neural engine calibrated to Malta Market Index 2026

search.placeholder: Where would you like to live?

mortgage.title: Mortgage Intelligence
mortgage.subtitle: Malta 2026 · Resident & Non-Resident
mortgage.ltv_warning: ⚠️ Your deposit is below the {{min}}% minimum for {{type}}. Maltese banks cap lending at {{max}}% LTV.

investor_insight.title: Investor Insight
investor_insight.description: The net yield accounts for 15% flat rental tax, management fees, and maintenance. Malta's long-term capital appreciation (avg 5%) is NOT included in this figure.

buy_vs_rent.title: Buy vs Rent Intelligence
buy_vs_rent.subtitle: Malta 2026 · Financial Reality Check
buy_vs_rent.intro: The question every investor asks — and every portal avoids answering honestly. We model both scenarios to the cent over your chosen time horizon.
buy_vs_rent.stamp_duty_info: Malta Stamp Duty: estimated at 5% (standard rate)
buy_vs_rent.notary_fees_info: Notary & AIP Fees: estimated at ~1.1% of purchase price
buy_vs_rent.upfront_costs_deduction: These are deducted from the deposit pool and compared fairly.
buy_vs_rent.buying_better_off: Buying leaves you {{amount}} better off after {{years}} years vs renting and investing the equivalent capital.
buy_vs_rent.renting_better_off: Renting and investing the equivalent capital leaves you {{amount}} better off after {{years}} years.
buy_vs_rent.outperform_info: Buying would outperform renting after year {{year}}
buy_vs_rent.key_driver: Property appreciation at {{rate}}%/yr is the key driver
buy_vs_rent.disclaimer: This model simplifies tax treatment and assumes consistent growth rates. For Malta tax-resident buyers, 15% rental income tax applies if the property is later let. Consult a licensed adviser before making investment decisions.

hub.subtitle: Expert Intelligence
hub.description: Your definitive guide to the Maltese property market. From legal frameworks and tax optimization to regional investment deep-dives, we provide the intelligence you need to make informed decisions.

newsletter.title: Stay Ahead of the Market
newsletter.description: Subscribe to our monthly Market Intelligence report for exclusive data, off-market opportunities, and regulatory updates.

article.disclaimer: Information provided on Malta Luxury Real Estate is for general guidance only and does not constitute legal, financial, or tax advice. Always consult a licensed professional for advice specific to your circumstances.
article.sidebar_newsletter_desc: Exclusive market updates and investment insights, monthly.

pre_qualifier.title: Mortgage Pre-Qualifier
pre_qualifier.subtitle: Bank Pulse Engine
pre_qualifier.intro: Get an instant borrowing estimate based on current Malta bank loan-to-value (LTV) and debt-ratio policies.

labels.debt_desc: Total monthly payments for other loans, credit cards, or child support.
labels.stress_test_warning: Central Bank stress-test: We apply +2% to current rates to strictly assess your repayment capacity.

sales_tax.title: Sales Tax & Final Withholding
sales_tax.subtitle: For Sellers & Landowners
sales_tax.disclaimer: Malta's Final Withholding Tax (FWT) is typically calculated on the full selling price, NOT the profit. Selling after holding for more than 2 years may incur different rates depending on specific local budget adjustments.

interactive_tools.subtitle: Financial Intelligence
interactive_tools.intro: Precise financial modeling for the Maltese real estate market. Our tools utilize the latest 2026 tax regulations and proprietary market data.

info.tax_update_desc: Our tools reflect the latest budget measures including UCA exemptions and the Gozo first-residence scheme.
info.roi_benchmarks_desc: Sliema and St. Julian's are currently delivering 4.2% - 5.8% net yields for luxury rental property.
info.oracle_desc: Get an instant, AI-powered valuation for any Maltese property using our neural market index.

market.title: Malta Property Market – Live
market.areaPriceHeatSubtitle: Live price per m² data by locality
market.disclaimer: Data sourced from Malta Property Price Register (PPR), active listing counts across major portals, and Malta Tourism Authority short-let data. Statistics are updated daily at 06:00 CET. For institutional data access, contact data@maltaluxuryrealestate.com.
market.analystNoteBody: Malta's residential market continues its resilient upward trajectory. High net worth international interest remains robust.
market.risingInventoryBody: With listing supply ticking upwards, buyers have regained 4.2% more negotiation leverage compared to Q4 last year.
market.gozoOpportunityBody: Gozo properties are appreciating at 8.3% annually — double the Malta average — driven by the bridge tunnel announcement. Properties secured before 2027 are positioned to benefit from 2028 infrastructure completion.
market.globalSentimentBody: High net worth interest from Northern Europe remains the primary driver for €1.5M+ SDA properties.
market.gozo_bridge_subtitle: Price index vs. tunnel announcement impact
market.bridge_prediction: If bridge completes by 2028, our model projects Gozo prices to reach parity with north Malta by 2031 (+38% from current avg).

oracle.title: Price Oracle
oracle.subtitle: Value Your Property
oracle.description: State-of-the-art AI valuation based on real transaction data, market inventory, and architectural premiums.
oracle.loading_subtitle: Evaluating architectonic premiums and location heat.
oracle.insight_body: Market heat index in {{location}} is steady. We recommend HOLDING until Q4 2026 to capitalize on projected capital gains.

features.registry_desc: Direct API connection to current market registry ensures your valuation is a data-backed reflection of real transactional behavior.
features.precision_desc: From luxury hubs to historic streets, we weight valuations based on highly specific micro-location demand.
features.logic_desc: The Oracle automatically accounts for Urban Conservation Area tax exemptions and Special Designated Area premiums.

quiz.subtitle: Find your perfect match in 60 seconds.
quiz.analyzing_subtitle: Our AI is scanning the island for your perfect match.
quiz.share_desc: Share your 'Property DNA' with your partner or friends.

bottom.fun_desc: No registration needed. Just lifestyle questions to help you visualize your life in Malta.
bottom.market_desc: Results are synced with real market inventory and area statistics for 2026.
bottom.area_desc: Get deep-dive recommendations for specific neighborhoods based on your vibe.

questions.text: How do you envision your perfect morning?

options.a: Coffee on a seafront balcony with harbor views
options.b: Stroll through quiet, historic limestone streets
options.c: A dip in your private pool overlooking Gozo's hills
options.d: Waking up in a modern, smart-home penthouse

options.a: Fine dining and social clubs in a vibrant hub
options.b: A quiet wine at a 400-year-old local 'Gozitan' farmhouse
options.c: Art gallery opening followed by a boutique jazz club
options.d: Hosting a sunset BBQ on a massive terrace

options.b: Privacy, space, and a mature garden
Long-term capital gains in emerging areas

sliema_stjulians.title: The Cosmopolitan Elite
sliema_stjulians.description: You love being where the action is. High-energy, luxury amenities, and the sparkling Mediterranean at your doorstep. Your lifestyle demands convenience, style, and the best nightspots on the island.

valletta_mdina.title: The Heritage Collector
valletta_mdina.description: History isn't just a category for you; it's a way of life. You appreciate the soul of 400-year-old limestone walls, boutique culture, and the majestic silence of the Silent City.

gozo_farmhouse.title: The Mediterranean Soul
gozo_farmhouse.description: You seek serenity, authenticity, and space. Gozo is your sanctuary. You value the 'Bridge Effect' potential but prioritize the slow, beautiful pace of village life and rolling hills.

madliena_villa.title: The Privacy Seeker
madliena_villa.description: Privacy is the ultimate luxury. You want space, mature gardens, and a gated-feel environment. You prefer the quiet prestige of Malta's most exclusive residential heights.

about.description: Malta Luxury Real Estate was founded on a simple premise: to simplify the acquisition of the Maltese islands' most exceptional properties. We are not just a marketplace; we are the bridge between discerning international investors and the islands' most reputable real estate specialists.

values.title: Our Foundational Principles
values.subtitle: Everything we do is guided by a commitment to quality and a deep respect for the architectural heritage of Malta and Gozo.

value1.title: Integrity First
value1.desc: We curate only the most reputable agencies and properties, ensuring a transparent and secure acquisition process for international HNWIs.

value2.title: Unrivaled Expertise
value2.desc: Our deep understanding of Maltese property law, tax optimization (MPRP/SDA), and market trends provides an unfair advantage to our clients.

value3.title: Discreet Service
value3.desc: Luxury real estate is about privacy. Our platform and partners operate with the highest level of confidentiality and professionalism.

value4.title: Global Perspective
value4.desc: Tailored for the international buyer, our insights bridge the gap between Mediterranean charm and global investment standards.

director.quote: We don't just list properties; we represent a way of life that respects the history of these islands while embracing the future of global investment.
director.name: Alexander Vanhaut

eeat.title: The Quality Standard (E-E-A-T)
eeat.desc: As a verified member of the Maltese real estate ecosystem, we provide more than just listings. Our intelligence suite—including ROI calculators and tax guides—is built on primary research and 20+ years of local market data.
points: Expert Advisory on SDAs and Residency
